title: worldview — P-GOV-3: Philosophical-ethical worldview layer with normative metrics, criticality and common-good alignment for GenesisAeon
description:
Philosophical-ethical worldview layer: WorldviewEngine with normative metrics (Coherence, Resonance, Emergence, Poetics, Criticality), CriticalityChecker (CREP) and AlignmentFramework (Personhood-Levels 0–6) for the GenesisAeon ecosystem.

Part of the GenesisAeon ecosystem (P-GOV-3, domain: governance / philosophical-ethical CREP evaluation).

See github.com/GenesisAeon/worldview for source, documentation, and reproducibility notebooks.
